field_values.action_summary: The group continues their journey along the riverbank toward the Yellow Brick Road. They wander into a vast, beautiful meadow filled with scarlet poppies. The visual beauty masks the deadly scent of the flowers.
field_values.camera_intent: EWS of vast poppy field scale; CU of poppies and wafting scent particles; MS of characters exhibiting heavy-lidded lethargy
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Poppy density and color saturation must remain consistent across shots
Lighting transition from sunny riverbank to hazy, saturated meadow atmosphere
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH008_SC003

## Production Intent
Transition the group from the active river crossing into a vast, visually overwhelming meadow. The environment must shift from high-energy movement to a heavy, lethargic atmosphere where the beauty of the scarlet poppies masks an insidious threat.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion

## Required Environments
- swift_river_crossing
- scarlet_poppy_meadow

## Continuity Constraints
- Poppy density and color saturation must remain consistent across shots.
- Lighting transition from sunny riverbank to hazy, saturated meadow atmosphere.

## Beat List
- BT001: Transition from river to meadow.
- BT002: Sensory immersion in poppies.
- BT003: Onset of lethargy.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
